data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of skipping individual occurrences, but the evidence provided does not confirm this capability. The linked use case describes a recurring service but does not explicitly mention the ability to skip individual occurrences, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. The evidence pointers highlight that the linked use case does not support the expected result of confirming the requirement or capturing a precise gap.
gaps: The ability to skip individual occurrences is not explicitly defined in the linked use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
